title: SASC Advances 1,279 Military Nominations
description: Today, the Senate Armed Services Committee voted by voice en bloc to report out favorably a list of 1,279 military nominations in the Army, Navy, Air...
text:
Today, the Senate Armed Services Committee voted by voice en bloc to report out favorably a list of 1,279 military nominations in the Army, Navy, Air Force, Marine Corps, and Space Force. This list includes 12 general officer and flag officer promotions.
The nominations were immediately reported to the floor following the Committee’s action.
